name: Zhiyun Parabolic Softbox 90D
description: The Parabolic Softbox 90D from Zhiyun is a 3' parabolic softbox designed for use with Bowens mount fixtures.

features.Key Features:: 3' Diameter, Bowens Mount | 16-Rod Softbox | Includes Diffusers & Grid | Includes Carry Case
features.What’s in the box?: Zhiyun Parabolic Softbox 90D (3') | 2 x Diffuser | Grid | Bag | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
